subcodes.first_line: O ye members of the radiant Assembly! Praise be to God that the lights of the Sun of Reality show forth from the horizon of Urbana… When saying the Obligatory Prayer, one must turn towards the Holy Reality of Bahá’u’lláh, that Reality which encompasseth all things
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @praise and encouragement, @importance of prayer, @Manifestation of God as educator
